PowerShell($basePath = "e:\\CAPSTONE PROJECT\\PowerWize\\templates\\lms"; $files = @\("certificates_manage.html", "submissions.html", "module_form.html"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $fullPath = Join-Path $basePath $f; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($fullPath\); $bom = $bytes[0..3]; Write-Output "File: $f"; if \($bom[0] -eq 239 -and $bom[1] -eq 187 -and $bom[2] -eq 191\) { Write-Output "  Encoding: UTF-8 with BOM" } elseif \($bom[0] -eq 255 -and $bom[1] -eq 254\) { Write-Output "  Encoding: UTF-16 LE" } else { Write-Output "  Encoding: UTF-8 \(no BOM\)" } })
